TAGLINE: A place to savor life's little moments.
ABOUT_TEXT: The Cup of Joe is a cozy coffee shop in Better Living, Parañaque — a place to savor life's little moments over a handcrafted cup. From Dirty Matcha to Spanish Mocha Latte, every drink is made to be enjoyed at your own pace. Open daily from 7 AM to midnight.
MENU_ITEM_1_DESC: Rich matcha latte with an espresso kick — bold green tea meets smooth coffee.
MENU_ITEM_2_DESC: Chocolate and espresso with a Spanish twist — creamy, indulgent, and satisfying.
MENU_ITEM_3_DESC: Sweet and salty caramel popcorn crunch — a playful treat to pair with your coffee.
MENU_ITEM_4_DESC: Nutty hazelnut meets rich chocolate mocha — a warm, comforting classic.
TESTIMONIAL_1_QUOTE: "Tried the Dirty Matcha — really good! Friendly staff and cozy place. Will definitely come back."
TESTIMONIAL_2_QUOTE: "Spanish Mocha Latte is perfect for my sweet tooth. My go-to spot in Better Living."
TESTIMONIAL_3_QUOTE: "Open until midnight which is rare in the area. Perfect for late night coffee runs. Love the Salted Caramel Popcorn too."
ADDRESS: Matthew St. Annex 35, Better Living Subd. Don Bosco, Parañaque
SEO_TITLE: The Cup of Joe | Cafe in Parañaque
SEO_DESCRIPTION: The Cup of Joe — a cozy coffee shop in Better Living, Parañaque. Handcrafted drinks from Dirty Matcha to Spanish Mocha Latte. Open daily 7AM–12AM.
